subcodes.first_line: O Ustad Aqa! In this moment when I am companioned by remembrance of the Beloved Friend, and in utter humility and reverence before His Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای استاد آقا در این دم که بیاد حضرت دوست همدمم و در کمال خضوع و خشوع بملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
